JUDGE PRO-TEM MARC SEIDENFELD, BFIELDS, REPORTER, GGOROSIN, CLERK. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. ALL PARTIES PRESENT, DEFT IN PRO PER. CASE SETTLED, TERMS ON THE RECORD, PLTF. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
PHOTOCOPY FOR 1 COPY FOR CASE 113813. PLTF COPY. FOR PLAINTIFF SHAIKH, FATIMA U.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MUSIC, DEEANNE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 663 VALENCIA STREET, ROOM #44, SF, CA, STAYED UNTIL MAR-01-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFT VACATES THE PREMISES BY 5:00 PM 2/28/95, PLTF. SHALL WAIVE ALL BACK RENTS AND DAMAGES. IF DEFT DOES NOT VACATE AS STATED ABOVE, PLTF. SHALL BE ENTITLED TO $1,300.00 IN BACK RENT AND DAMAGES. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
